title: HOOD Forecast — Price Target — Prediction for 2027
text: TradingView forecast and price target analysis for Robinhood Markets extending into 2027. Current Price Level: As of May 2026, trading around $78-82 after 32% decline from 2025 highs. Short-term technical picture mixed with support and resistance levels. Price Target Analysis: Bull Case: $125+ price target implies 50%+ upside from current levels. Assumes PDT rule drives trading volume surge. Crypto market recovery adds earnings boost. Multiple expansion on growth. Base Case: $105-110 price target reflects analyst consensus. Assumes modest improvement from Q1 miss. Steady growth trajectory resumes. Bear Case: $75-85 range if trading volumes continue to deteriorate. Crypto remains depressed. Valuation compression on slower growth. Technical Levels: Support: $75 (recent lows). Resistance: $85-90, then $100-105. 2027 Outlook: Analysts expect earnings recovery to $2.3-2.5 range if growth accelerates. Prediction market growth could be significant upside. International expansion in early stages. Gold subscriber growth provides recurring revenue anchor. Risks: Continued crypto weakness. Competitive intensity in retail trading. Regulatory changes unfavorable. Economic slowdown affecting retail participation.
